text.title: Claude API Integration Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether the full `ClaudeService` wrapper applies. Root question targets cross-subagent reuse; branches name a concrete observable and conclude with a core rule reference or a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Will more than one Claude surface (completion + tool use + cache + batch + vision) be reused across two or more subagents in this codebase?

branch.conclusion: Build `ClaudeService` and centralise stop_reason per rule r1.
Wire event-level streaming per rule r2.
Wire tool round-trip per rule r3.
Wire vision (base64 + URL + PDF, image-first) per rule r4.
Wire Extended Thinking per rule r5.
Wire Prompt Caching per rule r6.
Wire Batch API per rule r7.
Skip; use the narrower methodology (`claude-messages-api`, `claude-tool-use`, or `claude-advanced-features`).

example.description: A multi-agent SDD pipeline plans → designs → executes, each step a Claude call. The tree concludes `r1`: build `ClaudeService` and validate `stop_reason` once in the service layer.
